prerequisites.value: Critical Focus, base attack bonus +11, worshiper of an evil deity.

description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you confirm a critical hit against an opponent, in addition to dealing critical damage as normal, you maim your target so much that it takes 2 points of Charisma damage and becomes staggered for 1 round. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: When you confirm a critical hit against an opponent, you can spend 4 stamina points to increase the Charisma damage that opponent takes from Destroy Identity to 1d3+1 points.
